Getting Started Guide

Welcome to the getting started guide. This document covers the basics of setting up and configuring the project.

Prerequisites

Before installing, make sure you have Node.js 18+ installed.

Installation

Run the following command to install:

npm install my-package@latest

Configuration

Create a config file in your project root:

{ "key": "value", "newOption": true }

Usage

Import and use the package:

import { MyPackage } from 'my-package';
const pkg = new MyPackage({ newOption: true });

Troubleshooting

If you encounter issues, try clearing your cache and reinstalling.

That's it! You're ready to go.

Last updated: 2026-04-14
